headline: Can PPL's Cost-Control Efforts Support Long-Term Earnings Growth?

headline: BMO Capital Maintains Outperform on Duke Energy, Lowers Price Target to $134
summary: BMO Capital  analyst James Thalacker   maintains Duke Energy (NYSE:DUK) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $138 to $134.
